productName: Yellow Jackets (2 mini 1/2g per tube)- Rainier Sour Diesel (White Star) X Rainbow Zkittlez (PHDC2) (+) (H)
description: This infused hybrid pre-roll wraps Sour Diesel flower around a concentrate boost (think kief, hash, distillate, or diamonds) for a louder aroma and a longer session. Built for a stronger, longer session and more intense effects — with notes of diesel, chemical, and skunk, with a versatile, anytime balance. A little goes a long way.
